MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-27-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Tom Elke, Esq. (415-294-4111) of Elke & Merchant for Plaintiff/opposing party Pamela Piccinini.
No other Appearance.

Counsel reports matter is uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs MARK ZUFFO, JOHN ZUFFO, ERNESTINE ZUFFO's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is DENIED. Request for punitive damages is sufficiently supported by factual allegations. Order is signed in open court.(see scanned order for details)Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
